command: echo '=== Looking for .ex5 ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/' -name '*.ex5' 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Last 200 lines of Feb 25 log ===' && tail -200 '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/20260225.log' 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Last 200 lines of Feb 24 log ===' && tail -200 '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/20260224.log' 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'signal\|trade\|order\|session\|news\|spread\|reject\|skip\|block\|error\|warn' | tail -50
